race.comment: TIDDY WIDDY (4) was far from her best last time in a tough maiden at Oakbank but was ticking along well prior. Will find this much easier and is a great chance to finally shed her maiden tag. GINGERMAC (3) is close to a win, the latest effort a solid third at this track over 1100m. Peaking now third-up and gets in well with again at the weights with the 2kg claimer sticking. Anticipating another big run. SOCIAL DANCER (8) was no match for an impressive winner but did warm nicely late to grab second. Will likely drift back from the wide alley and be charging late. FIRST FEELING (9) was a big improver last time at Broken Hill when beaten less than a length in second. In the mix if she can hold that form. CONJOIN (2) was well supported fresh and showed good early speed before tiring quickly. Better for the hitout and remains n the mix.
